channel.title: Christopher-S-Penn on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Christopher-S-Penn on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: The top business-killing habit: silos
item.description:
And, this is applicable for more than just the sales and marketing teams if you ask me…

“Put everyone on as few systems as possible, discourage fiefdoms of data, and you’ll win far more than you’ll lose.”

[Read the full article here][1][1]: http://www.christopherspenn.com/2014/04/the-top-business-killing-habit-silos/

item.title: The secret to learning how to do anything
item.description:
Having a problem to solve is always a good way to really learn anything.

Read the full article here
